title: ferula sulcata var. scabra
intro: Ferula sulcata var. scabra, also known as the rough or scabrous ferula, is a plant species within the carrot family that is native to Central Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Ferula sulcata var. scabra include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Ferula sulcata var. scabra include essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, relieve pain, and support overall well-being.
